scripts.build: echo '📦 Production build using webpack' && webpack --mode=production
scripts.build:dev: echo '🔧 Development build using webpack (unminified, with source maps)' && webpack --mode=development
scripts.start: echo '🚀 Starting webpack-dev-server in production mode' && cross-env NODE_ENV=production webpack-dev-server
scripts.start:dev: echo '🛠️  Starting webpack-dev-server in development mode (hot reload)' && cross-env NODE_ENV=development webpack-dev-server
scripts.lint: echo '🔍 Running ESLint on all JS/TS source files' && eslint "src/**/*.{js,ts}"
scripts.lint-error: echo '❌ Running ESLint reporting errors only (no warnings)' && eslint --quiet "src/**/*.{js,ts}"
scripts.lint-fix: echo '✏️  Running ESLint and auto-fixing all fixable issues' && eslint --fix "src/**/*.{js,ts}"
scripts.lint-staged: echo '📋 Running ESLint and Prettier on staged git files only' && lint-staged
scripts.test: echo '🧪 Full test suite: lint, production build, then Jest' && npm run lint && npm run build && jest
scripts.test:jest: echo '🧪 Running Jest unit tests only (skips lint and build)' && jest
scripts.jest: echo '🧪 Running Jest unit tests' && jest
scripts.start:jest: echo '👀 Running Jest in interactive watch mode (re-runs on file change)' && jest --watch
scripts.simulate: echo '🎮 Running headless game simulation tests (sequential)' && jest --config jest.simulation.config.js --runInBand
